summary: Script excels: strong type hints, error handling, clear docstrings, robust glob-pattern logic. Workflow has good structure (actions/checkout@v4 pinned, proper permissions, sensible triggers) but is incomplete and would fail on first run: (1) references tests/test_label_assigner.py without providing it; (2) unit-tests job fails immediately if test file missing; (3) assign-labels job fails—no rules.json or changed_files.txt fixture setup; (4) duplicates label_assigner.py invocation (lines 38–46: default format + JSON format could use single run with both outputs); (5) missing act-result.txt capture and test harness validation loop. Script is production-ready; workflow is non-functional.
